message:
feat(ops): add chaos + scale validation harness (ft-3681t.7.4)

Resilience harness that exercises large pane counts (up to 1k), bursty
connector traffic with circuit breaker trips, policy churn under CPU/memory
pressure, and partial outage scenarios. Integrates ContextBudgetRegistry,
ReliabilityRegistry, and CapacityGovernor with SLO-based pass/fail gates.

Failure classes: ConnectorTransient, ConnectorOffline, CpuOverload,
MemoryExhaustion, IoStall, PolicyChurn, ContextExhaustion, RchWorkerLoss,
CascadingFailure.

23 unit tests covering green path, individual failure classes, combined
failures, SLO semantics, recovery scenarios, and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
